title: void'(some_queue.pop_front()); in the body of an if-stmt lints cleanly but fails to produce good cpp

features.name: void-cast expression with queue pop_front in if-body
features.description: Code should include a void-cast expression calling queue.pop_front() inside an if statement body

features.name: queue pop_front method call in if-body
features.description: Code should include a queue pop_front method call used as a standalone statement inside an if body

features.name: void-cast function call in if-body
features.description: Code should include a void-cast function call used as a statement inside an if statement body
